---
title: "Partnerships"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Collaborating for better educational outcomes"
description: "Learn about chen.ist Academy's partnerships with educational institutions and industry leaders to build a stronger learning ecosystem."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Academy <span class="gr">Partnerships</span></h1>
    <p>Building a stronger educational ecosystem through collaboration with academia, industry, and community organizations.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Partnership types</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four models designed for mutual impact.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i><h3>Academic</h3><p>Joint certifications, research collaborations, student projects, and specialized workshops with universities and schools.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building"></i><h3>Industry</h3><p>Internship pipelines, sponsored projects, guest lectures, and technology access with companies and organizations.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i><h3>Community</h3><p>Scholarships, digital literacy programs, community workshops, and mentorship for underrepresented groups.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i><h3>Research</h3><p>Joint research projects, access to advanced technologies, publications, and innovation incubation.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Featured partners</h2>
    <p class="sub">Organizations we're proud to work with.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><img src="/assets/logo/ucv.jpg" alt="University of Craiova" style="width: 80px; height: auto; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 1rem;"><h3>University of Craiova</h3><p>Joint research and curriculum development for the Open4tech Summer School program.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building" style="font-size: 3rem; color: var(--c); margin-bottom: 1rem;"></i><h3>TechInnovate Inc.</h3><p>Industry partner providing mentorship, internships, and practical project opportunities.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart" style="font-size: 3rem; color: var(--c); margin-bottom: 1rem;"></i><h3>Digital Futures Foundation</h3><p>Community partnership expanding technology access to underserved communities.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>How it works</h2>
    <p class="sub">From first conversation to launch.</p>
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-md-8">
        <div class="m-step">
          <div class="m-step-num">1</div>
          <div class="m-step-txt"><h3>Initial discussion</h3><p>We explore potential collaboration areas and alignment with your goals.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="m-step">
          <div class="m-step-num">2</div>
          <div class="m-step-txt"><h3>Proposal development</h3><p>Together we define partnership goals, structure, and deliverables.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="m-step">
          <div class="m-step-num">3</div>
          <div class="m-step-txt"><h3>Agreement</h3><p>We formalize terms, expectations, and a timeline for activities.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="m-step">
          <div class="m-step-num">4</div>
          <div class="m-step-txt"><h3>Implementation</h3><p>Launch partnership activities with ongoing management and regular reviews.</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Why partner with us</h2>
    <p class="sub">What you bring, what you gain.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Motivated Community</h3><p>Access a network of skilled technology learners and professionals.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i><h3>Curriculum Influence</h3><p>Shape educational content to match real industry needs.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-megaphone"></i><h3>Visibility</h3><p>Reach our network of professionals, students, and partner organizations.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-puzzle"></i><h3>Real Projects</h3><p>Collaborative projects that address real-world challenges.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-award"></i><h3>CSR Support</h3><p>Meaningful initiatives for corporate social responsibility programs.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i><h3>Talent Pipeline</h3><p>Early access to trained, job-ready graduates from our programs.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Stronger together</h2>
    <p>Join our network of partners shaping the future of technology education.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Start a conversation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No commitment required &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Flexible models &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Mutual benefit
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
